- Description: Visiting the final store in Rochester New York 
  
  Visited the final store in Rochester New York
  
  Basically a voodoo shop. They asked if we have cacao butter for lip balm. Didn’t want powder form 
  
  Mentioned they are not medically certified. So all the stuff they sell are for magic properties and don’t really want customers ingesting them. This was the feedback she gave when I suggested we have cacao tea too similar to the other herbs she have available for sale
